name: orange-pm
description: Orange PM — a marketplace for PM planning document automation

plugins.name: orange-pm
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin for PM planning teams. Automates the 6-stage Discovery → Graph → Fanout → Draft → Integrate → Confirm workflow with 36 skills and 6 agents. Integration with external systems (wiki, issue tracker, design tool, messenger) auto-detects and uses whatever MCP server/connector the user has connected. Must be run with the Planning-Agent-Hub directory set as the working directory.

requirements.workingDirectory: Claude Code must be run from within the Planning-Agent-Hub directory. See README.md for details.
